title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.060 - Licenses granted by clerks in vacation
text:
237.060.  Licenses granted by clerks in vacation. — The clerk of the county commission, in vacation, may grant ferry licenses, assess the tax and fix the rates for the same, and exercise all the power of the commission touching the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 15292) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14204; 1919 § 5538; 1909 § 6481
